title: Potion armor
description: Potion armor gives the player a permanant potion effect
body:
This plugin adds potion armor. Potion armor is bascially normal armor exept it gives a permanent potion effect. The potion effects can be changed in the config file. Just set the potion to false that you dont want. To get the armor you need a smithing table, then put atleast 7 netherite ingots, the armor piece(supports all armor), and the potion effect. The chestplate will then get the corresponding effect from the potion
![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d9ea3331eb6296977296a6418b0b0e8628948c14.png)
